name: Peanut Butter S'mores
recipeIngredient: 2 Packages 1.6oz Chocolate Covered Peanut Butter Cups -- unwrapped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one peanut butter cup on each of four crackers.
2. Spear marshmallows on a long fork or clean stick.
3. Toast marshmallows over campfire coals or grill on low heat.
4. Place toasted marshmallow on top of each peanut butter cup.
5. Top each with cracker.
6. Press together and hold for a few seconds to melt chocolate.
